query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contractor_credentials (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contractor_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  abn VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  abn_status ENUM('active', 'cancelled', 'not_found', 'pending') DEFAULT 'pending',
  abn_verified_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  license_number VARCHAR(50),
  license_state VARCHAR(10),
  license_type VARCHAR(100),
  license_status ENUM('valid', 'expired', 'suspended', 'cancelled', 'not_found', 'pending') DEFAULT 'pending',
  license_expiry DATE,
  license_verified_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  insurance_status ENUM('valid', 'expired', 'not_provided', 'pending') DEFAULT 'pending',
  insurance_expiry DATE,
  workers_comp_status ENUM('valid', 'expired', 'exempt', 'not_provided', 'pending') DEFAULT 'pending',
  last_verified_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  verification_source VARCHAR(100),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_abn (abn)
);
